title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 10 2021
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 10 2021
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 10 2021
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 10/11/2021
DCE iron ore futures fell sharply today, and I2201 hit new low of 671 yuan/mt. an decrease of 4.62% throughout the day;the quotation in themorning was decreased by 30-50 yuan/mt over yesterday. some traders were active to sell, and they were gived more bargain space.
